text: A photograph of a two-story building in a residential area. The exterior walls are painted in faded colors (blue, orange, and yellow) and show signs of wear and peeling paint. The ground floor features two open doorways. The left doorway is dark, where a person wearing a red shirt and light shorts is standing. The right doorway is partially covered by a blue awning and reveals a pink interior wall and a framed picture. The second floor has a large window covered by a metal security grille. The roof is corrugated metal, and utility wires are visible across the scene.
label: Image
